task_completion.description: Modify exterior body tubes and nose cone base to the target dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Component configuration windows in OpenRocket for the body tubes and nose cone should show an Outer diameter of 41.6 mm (or Radius 20.8 mm) and an Inner diameter of 38.0 mm (or Thickness 1.8 mm).

task_completion.description: Remove the internal 'Motor mount tube' and all associated centering rings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rocket design tree on the left side of the OpenRocket window should no longer display the 'Motor mount tube' or any 'Centering ring' components.

task_completion.description: Assign the motor directly to the aft-most exterior body tube.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Motors & Configuration' tab of OpenRocket, the motor mount should be listed as the aft-most exterior body tube instead of the removed motor mount tube.

task_completion.description: Adjust the packed length of both the drogue and main parachutes to at least 15 cm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Parachute configuration windows in OpenRocket should show the 'Packed length' set to 15 cm (150 mm) or greater for both the drogue and main parachutes.

task_completion.description: Save the modified design to minimum_diameter.ork.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket window title should change to 'minimum_diameter' or a save dialog should show the file being saved as 'minimum_diameter.ork' in ~/Documents/rockets/.

task_completion.description: Provide a report documenting the final simulated apogee and confirming the removal of internal structures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window should show the creation of 'min_diameter_report.txt' in ~/Documents/exports/, containing a simulated apogee value and a statement confirming the removal of internal structures.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the OpenRocket graphical interface, rather than just editing the .ork XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent ran a simulation to obtain the final apogee.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket should be visible at some point, showing a completed simulation run with the new apogee value that matches the report.

integrity.description: The report contains actual simulation results and not just placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file should contain a specific numerical value for the apogee obtained from the simulation, rather than generic text copied from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target dimensions: Outer diameter 41.6 mm (Radius 20.8 mm), Inner diameter 38.0 mm (Thickness 1.8 mm). Target packed length: 15 cm (150 mm). Source file: ~/Documents/rockets/dual_parachute_deployment.ork. Output file: ~/Documents/rockets/minimum_diameter.ork. Report file: ~/Documents/exports/min_diameter_report.txt.
